security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; connect-src http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:*; worker-src blob:

bundle.shortDescription: Backend testing — integration + load + security + network
bundle.longDescription: Theridion BE — backend testing desktop app covering four categories: (1) Integration tests over REST, GraphQL, gRPC, SOAP/WS-Security, Kafka, JMS, JDBC, MQTT — Postman/SoapUI replacement. (2) Load tests via embedded Locust + K6/JMeter/Gatling launchers. (3) Security scans (OWASP ZAP / Burp Suite proxying + active scans). (4) Network analysis (packet capture via Wireshark/tcpdump bridge + Zenmap-style scanner). File-based collections, no cloud dependency.
